app.name: Supermemory
app.one_liner: State-of-the-art memory and context engine for AI that automatically learns from conversations, extracts facts, builds user profiles, and delivers the right context at the right time.

screens.name: Memory Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display user profile, recent memory items, and connected data sources with search and filtering capabilities.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Ingest and store a new memory item with automatic fact extraction, contradiction handling, and temporal metadata.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build hybrid search endpoint combining RAG and user memory
week 1: Implement core memory ingestion pipeline with fact extraction
week 1: Integrate OAuth connector framework for Google/Notion
acceptance_tests: MCP OAuth flow completes successfully without HTTP 500 errors during connector setup.
System returns personalized context within 60ms for a user query involving both knowledge base and conversation history.
